testcase.name: should fetch bugs successfully
should handle network errors when fetching bugs
should handle invalid JSON responses when fetching bugs
should create a new bug successfully
should handle API errors when creating a bug
should handle network errors when creating a bug
should handle invalid JSON responses when creating a bug
should update a bug successfully
should handle not found error when updating a bug
should handle network errors when updating a bug
should handle invalid JSON responses when updating a bug
should delete a bug successfully
should handle not found error when deleting a bug
should handle network errors when deleting a bug
should not render the modal when isOpen is false
should render the modal when isOpen is true
should call onClose when the Cancel button is clicked
should call onConfirm when the Delete button is clicked
renders nothing when isOpen is false
renders modal content when isOpen is true
calls onClose when Cancel button is clicked
updates form fields when input values change
calls onSubmit with updated values when form is submitted
updates priority and status when select values change
should render with the provided message
should call onClose after 5 seconds
should call onClose when close button is clicked
should apply success styles by default
should apply error styles when type is error
should fade out before closing
should cleanup timers on unmount
should render the delete button
should call onDelete when the delete button is clicked
should log an error when the delete request fails
should render the comment section with existing comments
should submit a new comment
should handle error when submitting a comment
should render empty comments message when no comments are provided
should disable the submit button when form fields are empty
should display the correct timestamp for each comment
should not render when isOpen is false
should render the modal when isOpen is true
should handle form submission with correct data
should close modal when Cancel button is clicked
should update form data when inputs change
should not submit form with empty required fields
should have default Medium priority
should reset form data after closing and reopening
should render bug list after loading
should show error message if bugs fetch fails
should open add bug modal when clicking Add New Bug
should handle creating a new bug
should handle editing a bug
should handle deleting a bug
should show success notification after creating bug
should show success notification after deleting bug
should display correct status indicators
should display correct priority indicators
displays the correct version number
displays the version number in the header
